organization.name: HomeXpress Mortgage Corp
organization.raw_address: 1936 E. Deere Ave., Suite 205, Santa Ana, California 92705, US
organization.short_description:
HomeXpress Mortgage Corp is a mortgage lender based in Santa Ana, California, founded in 2015. The company specializes in non-QM (non-qualified mortgage) loans, business-purpose residential loans, and Agency mortgage products. Operating primarily as a wholesale lender, HomeXpress partners with approved brokers across 46 states and Washington, D.C. It has established itself as one of the top three non-QM wholesale lenders in the U.S., with a lifetime origination volume exceeding $10.7 billion.

HomeXpress offers a variety of mortgage products tailored to meet diverse borrower needs. This includes non-QM loans, business-purpose loans, and conventional products such as FHA, VA, and Prime Jumbo loans. The company emphasizes responsible lending and aims to provide speed, ease, and convenience in its services. With a team of approximately 300 employees and an executive team boasting over 150 years of combined experience, HomeXpress is well-equipped to support its broker network in delivering flexible lending solutions.

organization.short_description:
AmeriSave Mortgage Corporation is an online retail mortgage lender based in Atlanta, Georgia, founded in 2002. The company serves borrowers in 49 states and Washington, D.C., excluding New York. With a workforce of approximately 2,590 employees, AmeriSave generates annual revenue of $980.2 million and has a strong history of helping clients achieve homeownership through various mortgage options.

AmeriSave offers a wide range of mortgage products, including conforming loans, FHA loans, VA loans, USDA Rural Housing loans, and home equity lines of credit. They also provide specialized programs like the Lock & Drop temporary buydown program, which offers a reduced mortgage rate for the first year. The company is known for its digital-first approach, allowing borrowers to apply and track their loans online easily. AmeriSave has received high customer satisfaction ratings and is recognized for its commitment to fair lending practices.

organization.short_description:
ClearEdge Lending LLC is a wholesale lender based in Aliso Viejo, CA, specializing in Non-QM (Non-Qualified Mortgage) loans for mortgage brokers across the United States. Founded in 2015, the company has originated and securitized over $1 billion in Non-QM loans and has completed five securitizations. ClearEdge is known for its service-driven approach, utilizing custom in-house technologies to ensure quick turnaround times and efficient processing.

The company offers a range of innovative Non-QM products designed for various borrower needs, including Investor Cash Flow loans, One-Day Bank Statement loans, and Flex Underwriting options. ClearEdge emphasizes a high-touch service model, providing direct access to underwriters and account managers. With a commitment to fostering teamwork and career growth, ClearEdge has been recognized as a Top Workplace and focuses on competitive pay and employee investment. The company partners with mortgage brokers and third-party originators, aiming to support their growth in Non-QM lending without competing for borrowers directly.

organization.short_description:
USA Mortgage is an employee-owned, full-service mortgage bank based in St. Louis, Missouri. Founded in 2001 by Doug Schukar, the company operates as a direct-to-consumer lender and employs over 750 licensed loan officers and operations personnel. It is licensed in 41 states and Washington, D.C., with a strong presence in Missouri, Texas, Washington, and Ohio.

As one of the largest privately held mortgage bankers in Missouri, USA Mortgage offers a variety of residential mortgage products. These include conventional loans, government-backed loans (FHA, USDA, VA), jumbo loans, home renovation loans, new construction loans, and specialized programs such as bank statement loans and reverse mortgages. The company emphasizes a customer-centric approach, focusing on lending excellence and creative solutions to meet the needs of individual homebuyers and homeowners.

organization.raw_address: 6100 Tower Circle, Suite 600, Franklin, TN 37067, US
organization.short_description:
Franklin American Mortgage Company (FAMC) is a full-service mortgage banking firm based in Franklin, Tennessee. Founded in 1994, it operates as a division of Citizens Bank, N.A., providing residential mortgage financing across the United States. FAMC has grown significantly since its inception, expanding from $20 million in annual lending to $2 billion within nine years. The company employs around 519 people and reported $203.7 million in revenue.

FAMC offers a variety of residential mortgage packages, including options for home purchases, refinancing, and wholesale mortgage lending. The company operates through three main divisions: retail, wholesale, and correspondent, ensuring personalized support for borrowers, brokers, and lenders. FAMC is licensed nationwide and is recognized as an FHA Direct Endorsed lender, VA Automatic lender, and seller/servicer for Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae. Additionally, FAMC is involved in community sponsorships, including the Franklin American Mortgage Music City Bowl, supporting charitable causes and youth athletic organizations.

organization.name: Plaza Home Mortgage, Inc.
organization.raw_address: 9808 Scranton Rd, Suite 3000, San Diego, California 92121, US
organization.short_description:
Plaza Home Mortgage, Inc. is a full-service mortgage lender based in San Diego, California. Founded in December 2000, the company is a national leader in wholesale and correspondent lending, licensed in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Plaza operates with a decentralized structure, featuring regional loan centers and underwriters to maintain strong connections to local markets.

The company serves clients through two main channels: a Wholesale Channel for mortgage brokers, offering a variety of products and technology for efficient deal processing, and a National Correspondent Channel for mortgage banks, providing liquidity and accelerated execution. Plaza offers a wide range of mortgage programs, including conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, and reverse mortgages, along with innovative technology solutions like the BREEZE loan origination system. Plaza emphasizes personalized service and has a team of experienced professionals dedicated to client satisfaction.

organization.short_description:
Homebridge Financial Services, Inc. is a non-bank mortgage lender based in the United States, established in 1989. The company specializes in wholesale lending, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and a variety of mortgage products available across most U.S. states. Homebridge operates with around 3,000 associates and has shifted its focus to wholesale operations after selling its retail mortgage division in 2023.

The company offers a wide range of mortgage and refinancing options, including conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA loans, as well as jumbo loans and reverse mortgages. Homebridge is known for its renovation lending products and provides specialized services for first-time buyers, investment properties, and those with non-standard credit. The company emphasizes customer commitment and aims to simplify the mortgage process to support homeownership and real estate professionals.

organization.short_description:
California Mortgage Advisors, Inc.  is a full service mortgage banker servicing California since 1993.  CMA has built a strong reputation by providing professional and honest client consultation, highly competitive loan programs and superior customer service to our clients and Real Estate professionals. 

CMA is approved to sell mortgages to Fannie Mae, private investment firms and many of the nation's largest institutional banks.   Unlike a traditional bank that only offers one set of rules or guidelines, CMA underwrites to over 20 different banks and investors, providing our clients with more qualifying options, loan programs, interest rates and fee options.  CMA also has the ability to broker the loan to various wholesale lenders that offer special programs not offered by traditional lenders. 

CMA is committed to providing a competitive advantage in the marketplace with the highest level of customer service.

organization.name: American Pacific Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 3000 Lava Ridge Ct, Suite 200, Roseville, California 95661, US
organization.short_description:
American Pacific Mortgage (APM) is a national retail mortgage lender based in Roseville, California, founded in 1996. The company operates in 49 states with over 350 branches and employs more than 2,700 people. APM became 49% employee-owned in 2021, fostering a culture of retention and accountability. The company has funded over $22 billion annually and closed $13 billion in residential mortgages in 2022, serving more than 300,000 customers.

APM offers a full range of residential mortgage lending services, including specialty loan products tailored to various borrower needs. The company emphasizes a seamless digital experience combined with personal interactions through local Loan Advisors. APM partners with Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to provide affordable lending options and has integrated programs like HomeLight's "Buy Before You Sell" to enhance customer transactions. The APM Cares program supports employees and communities through grants and essential services, reflecting the company's commitment to building community and promoting the "American Dream."

organization.name: ⭐️Summit Lending - Home Loans for Real Life
organization.raw_address: 4967 NE Goodview Circle, Suite B, Lees Summit, MO 64064, US
organization.short_description:
NMLS Consumer Access:  https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/

Located at 4967B Goodview Circle, Lees Summit, MO, United States 64064

Summit Lending is a national, award-winning mortgage brokerage helping homebuyers make confident, informed decisions in a complex housing market. Founded in 2003, Summit Lending works with borrowers across the country to provide thoughtful guidance, transparent options, and loan solutions designed for real life.

We specialize in home purchase and refinance lending, including Conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA loans, as well as cash-out refinancing and home equity solutions. Our team works closely with first-time homebuyers, move-up buyers, self-employed borrowers, real estate investors, and trusted Realtor partners to navigate each stage of the homeownership journey.

Summit Lending is led by founder and CEO Darren Copeland, a top 1% mortgage originator nationwide and recipient of the 2025 AIME National Mortgage Broker of the Year award. Under his leadership, the company is built around education, long-term financial confidence, and helping clients use homeownership as a tool for stability and opportunity—not pressure or guesswork.

At Summit Lending, we believe home loans should fit real lives, real timelines, and real financial goals. Our mission is simple: provide clear guidance, strong advocacy, and an experience that puts the borrower first.

organization.raw_address: 980 Hammond Dr., Suite 850, Atlanta, GA 30328, US
organization.short_description:
Angel Oak Mortgage Solutions is a full-service, non-bank wholesale and correspondent lender based in Atlanta, Georgia. The company specializes in innovative non-QM (non-qualified mortgage) loan products aimed at underserved borrowers, including self-employed individuals, small business owners, and real estate investors. Operating primarily through brokers and non-delegated correspondents, Angel Oak is licensed in 47 states and the District of Columbia.

The company offers a range of flexible mortgage solutions tailored to individual needs. Key products include Bank Statement Loans, Investor Cash Flow/DSCR Loans, Asset Qualifier loans, and Platinum Jumbo options. Angel Oak emphasizes efficient processes, quick closings, and exceptional customer service. It also utilizes advanced tools like Prudent AI for underwriting and is expanding into HELOCs. Recognized as a "Top Workplace" for seven consecutive years, Angel Oak is committed to financial equity and wealth-building homeownership.

Modern banking rooted in our community.

At Bank of Franklin County, we're committed to serving the needs of the residents and businesses of this community. We do it by creating and delivering personal experiences through every interaction.  

"What we are giving our customers is the best of both worlds.  We offer the same products and services that the big banks offer coupled with local decision making and a different level of customer service our customers appreciate."  - Robert  Dobsch, President & CEO

organization.raw_address: 2475 Village View Dr, Henderson, Nevada 89074, US
organization.short_description:
Nations Direct Mortgage (NDM) is a nationwide wholesale mortgage lender based in Henderson, Nevada, with a focus on originating and purchasing residential mortgage loans. Founded in 2007, the company partners with mortgage brokers and non-delegated sellers across 41 states. NDM offers a comprehensive range of residential mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo loans, and various non-QM programs. The company emphasizes efficient processes, competitive rates, and exceptional support for its broker partners.

With a workforce of over 250 employees, NDM operates under a permanent work-from-anywhere model. The company fosters a strong culture of service, quality, and integrity, led by experienced professionals in the mortgage industry. NDM is also committed to community involvement, partnering with organizations like The Jessie Rees Foundation to support children with cancer. Recognized as the No. 1 Midsize Company by Top Workplaces, NDM is dedicated to providing a rewarding workplace and maintaining strong relationships with its partners.
